item.title: 官方网站及更多：视频开发日志 29 | Official Website and More: Video Devlog 29
item.description:
双鱼座工作室

发表于威慑的第 29 周视频开发日志。 本周游戏有了一个新网站和一个新的 UI 外观。

塔防与实时战略相结合，设定在不久的将来，您必须与将人类视为威胁的有知觉的人工智能作斗争。

官方网站

官网升级了！ 访问此处的网站，了解更多关于威慑的知识。 随着游戏的发展，该网站将继续获得更多信息和传说。 您还将找到内容创建者注册； 如果您或您认识的人是具有合理追随者的内容创建者，请分享该网站。

通缉玩家

仍在寻找玩家对威慑提供反馈。 如果您想自愿测试威慑，请加入 discord以获取有关如何参与的进一步说明。

新的用户界面外观

我在视频中使用了夜视滤镜，以提供更具未来感的外观。 为了让所有的 UI 按钮看起来也更具未来感，我决定采用新的样式和颜色来匹配。

即将到来的修复和添加

以下是将在下一次更新 v1.1 中对游戏进行的错误修复和新增内容：

  • 防御和占领目标将更新小地图和广告牌图标。

链接：
官方网站 - https://deterrence.piscesstudios.com/

如果您想关注威慑的发展，别忘了订阅或关注社交媒体！

脸书 - https://www.facebook.com/DeterrenceGame/
推特 - https://twitter.com/DeterrenceGame
不和谐服务器 - https://discord.gg/tH3qRhMau7
独立数据库 - https://www.indiedb.com/games/deterrence

原文:

Pisces Studios

Posted on Oct 8

The twenty-ninth weekly video devlog of Deterrence. This week the game gets a new website, and a new UI look.

A tower defense mixed with real-time strategy set in the not-too-distant future where you must fight against sentient artificial intelligence that sees humanity as a threat.

Official Website

The official website got an upgrade! Visit the site here to get more of look at the lore of Deterrence. The site will continue to get more info and lore as the game develops. You will also find a content creator sign up; If you or someone you know is a content creator with a reasonable following, then please share the site.

Playtesters Wanted

Still looking for playtesters to give feedback on Deterrence. If you'd like to volunteer to playtest Deterrence then please join the discord for further instructions on how to get involved.

New UI Look

I went with the night vision filter on the video to give a more futuristic look. To make all the UI buttons look more futuristic as well, I decided to go with new style and colors to match.

Upcoming Fixes and Additions

The following are bug fixes and additions to the game that will be in the next update v1.1:

  • Defend and capture objectives will update minimap and billboard icons.

Links:
Steam Page - https://store.steampowered.com/app/1972960/Deterrence/
Official Website - https://deterrence.piscesstudios.com/

If you would like to follow the development of Deterrence, don't forget to subscribe or follow on social media!

Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/DeterrenceGame/
Twitter - https://twitter.com/DeterrenceGame
Discord Server - https://discord.gg/tH3qRhMau7
Indie DB - https://www.indiedb.com/games/deterrence

Dinesh Kumar Gnanasekaran - Oct 1

item.title: Devops：入门 | Devops :Getting started
item.description:
鲁帕库玛丽

发表于核心价值
核心理念
方法

为什么选择 Devops？
敏捷方法论关注软件方法，不包括服务器维护。

部署速度更快 - 故障减少 50%

更好的恢复时间

团队彼​​此同步。

开发运维CAMS

  1. 人重于过程重于工具

  2. 自动化流程，我们真的需要这样做吗？

  3. 衡量客户活动并对此采取行动。

  4. 分担责任、所有权、反馈循环很重要。

流动思维
已经发生或正在进行的事情。

  • 放大反馈
    我们及时从运营团队获得反馈。

  • 实验和学习
    启动和工作中的新工具

    • 所以基本上，我们有代码，测试，部署在运行中。

    开发团队：计划、编码、构建和测试

    运营团队：发布、部署、运营和监控

    在开始之前要记住一些基本术语：

    • 供应
      服务器已准备好操作系统、软件和网络。

    • 部署
      在服务器上添加或升级软件

    • 编排
      在多个系统上协调操作。

    • 配置管理
      通过 RAM、空间、依赖软件等文件管理服务器配置

    • 命令式（程序式）
      产生所需状态的命令

    • 声明式（程序式）
      所需状态已定义，工具将实现它

    • 幂等的
      重复执行，结果相同

    • 蓝绿部署
      相同部署，用作交换机

    • 持续集成
      每次签入时构建和单元测试

    • 持续交付
      每次签入时部署在生产实时环境中

    • 持续部署
      单元测试后，以小补丁的形式将更改部署到生产环境。

    谢谢，
    鲁帕库玛丽

    马里奥·埃内斯托·维拉纽瓦·古铁雷斯 - 一旦暂停，rupaku 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    一旦解除暂停，rupaku 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦未发表，rupaku 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 rupaku 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    感谢您保护 DEV 社区👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 rupaku：

    举报其他不当行为

    取消标记 rupaku 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    Rupa Kumari

    Posted on Oct 8

    Devops is a cultural practice by developers and operational team to use each other's tool,to smooth out the process of software delivery.

    Core values
    Core Ideas
    Methods

    Why Devops?
    Agile methodology concerns about software methods,it doesn't cover server maintenace.

    Devops covers these points:

    Deploy faster - 50% Less failure

    Better recovery time

    Team is in sync with each other.

    Devops CAMS

    1. C - Culture talk to each other

      people over process over tools

    2. A - Automation
      Automate process and do we really need to do it?

    3. M - Measurement Measure to improve Replicate the stuff Cloudwatch monitor

      Measurement of client activity and take action on that.

    4. S - Sharing
      Share responsibilty,ownership ,feedback loop is important.

    Devops follow three basic steps:

    1. Flow thinking
      What is already happening,or in process.

    2. Amplify feedback
      We get feedback from ops team timely.

    3. Experiment and learn
      New tool in launch and work

    So basically,we have code,test,deploy under operation.

    Dev team : plan,code,build and test

    Ops team : release,deploy,operate and monitor

    Some basic terminology to rememeber before getting started:

    • Provisioning
      Server is ready with OS,software and networking.

    • Deployment
      Adding or upgrading software on server

    • Orchestration
      Coordinated operations on multiple systems.

    • Configuration management
      Managing server configuration via files such as RAM,space,dependency software etc

    • Imperative(Procedural)
      Commands to produce desired state

    • Declarative(Procedural)
      Desired state is defined and tools will achieve it

    • Idempotent
      Repeat execution and same result

    • Blue Green deployment
      Identical deployment,used as switch

    • Continuous Integration
      Build and unit test at every checkin

    • Continuous Delivery
      Deploy on production live environment at every checkin

    • Continuous Deployment
      After unit testing,deploy changes to production in small patches.

    Thanks,
    Rupa kumari

    Mario Ernesto Villanueva Gutierrez - Sep 3
